infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Starr Field uses Face ID to unlock the app and confirm sensitive actions like deleting field data.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Starr Field stamps your clock-in / clock-out times with GPS so timesheets and mileage logs are accurate.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Starr Field tracks location only while you're clocked in (per the privacy contract in plan §5.10.1) so the dispatcher knows where the crew is and IRS-compliant mileage logs generate automatically. Tracking stops within 60 seconds of clock-out.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Starr Field uses the camera to capture receipts, field photos, and short videos of jobsite conditions or found monuments.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Starr Field records voice memos so you can dictate notes hands-free, and captures audio with field videos. Recordings stay private to your Starr Surveying workspace.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Starr Field can attach existing photos and videos from your library to receipts, points, or jobs (e.g. media you captured before opening the app).
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Starr Field optionally backs up your captured photos and videos to your device's Photos library (under a 'Starr Field' album) so you keep a personal copy. Off by default — enable on the Me tab.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Starr Field uses Face ID to unlock the app and confirm sensitive actions like deleting field data.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Starr Field tracks location only while you're clocked in (per the privacy contract in plan §5.10.1) so the dispatcher knows where the crew is and IRS-compliant mileage logs generate automatically.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Starr Field stamps your clock-in / clock-out times with GPS so timesheets and mileage logs are accurate.

plugins.photosPermission: Starr Field can attach existing photos and videos from your library to receipts, points, or jobs.
plugins.cameraPermission: Starr Field uses the camera to capture receipts, field photos, and short videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Starr Field records audio when capturing field videos so the office hears site context.
Starr Field records voice memos so you can dictate notes hands-free.

plugins.photosPermission: Starr Field reads media when restoring backups.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Starr Field optionally saves a copy of every captured photo / video to your device's Photos library (Me → Backups toggle).
